_comment: Drives sync-tag-to-shelf.sh. Each entry mirrors a set of Calibre TAGS onto a Calibre-Web SHELF (one-way: tags are boss). 'tags' is a comma-separated list — a book must carry ALL listed tags to be put on the shelf (extra tags are fine). A single tag works too. The shelf ends up EXACTLY matching the set of books with all the tags: matching books are added, shelf books lacking the tags are removed. 'user' is the shelf OWNER's calibre-web username (email); a shelf is identified by name + owner. Add/remove/edit entries freely; no code change needed.
